response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct cloud-based GenAI deployment experience, or leadership in RAG/vector DB systems — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Extensive full-stack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source contributions, and cross-functional mentoring
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/GenAI systems
Lack of explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders
